popularStory.headline: Tomb Inscription
popularStory.description:
He was bured with his wife in the old kirk at Kilmarnock, their tomb bearing the inscription: 
Hic jacte Thomas Boyde, Dominus de Kilmarnock.
Qui ojijt septison die mensis Julii 1432.
Et Johanna de Mo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock於1405年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，他的父親Thomas De Boyd45歲，母親Faith or Alice Fleming103歲。他於1424年與Isabell Lyle在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1439年7月9日在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年34歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant spelling of Ty or a transferred use of the surname, a local name for someone who lived by a common pasture, Middle English tye.

nameMeanings.name: Brave"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (also Den Brave and De Brave): nickname from the adjective braaf ‘righteous, virtuous’ or perhaps from the same word in the older sense ‘courageous, brave’.
French: from the feminine form of   Brau  .

variants.name: Brau
meanings: traditional name from brân ‘raven’, now in wider use. In Welsh and Irish mythology, the name was borne by Bran the Blessed, a giant-sized god, the son of the sea god Mannannan Mac Lir. He had many heroic adventures before being mortally wounded in the foot with a poisoned spear while attempting to rescue his sister Branwen in Ireland. At his behest, his severed head was carried to the hill where the Tower of London now stands and buried there.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock was born in 1405, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Thomas De Boyd, was 45 and his mother, Faith or Alice Fleming, was 103. He married Isabell Lyle in 1424, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 9 July 1439, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock est né en 1405, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas De Boyd, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Faith or Alice Fleming, avait 103 ans. Il a épousé Isabell Lyle en 1424, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 9 juillet 1439, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Isabell Lyle nel 1424, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnockが1405年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas De Boydは45歳，母Faith or Alice Flemingは103歳であった。1424年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックでIsabell Lyleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1439年7月9日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで34歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock(이)가 1405년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas De Boyd(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Faith or Alice Fleming(은)는 103세였다. 그는 1424년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 Isabell Lyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1439년 7월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Isabell Lyle em 1424, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock родился в 1405 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Thomas De Boyd было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Faith or Alice Fleming, 103. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell Lyle в 1424 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 9 июля 1439 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
